generation_directive: Use your image-generation capability to generate a single cinematic, photorealistic piece of digital concept art. Do NOT draw it programmatically with code, and do NOT make a diagram or chart — call an actual image-generation model.
style: Dark neon / cyberpunk, cinematic. Cyan is the primary colour and reads as clean / trusted / ALLOW; magenta and red read as tainted / DENY; orange is a secondary accent. Motifs: circuit boards, glass-containment chambers, domes, and gate / boundary structures. Deep near-black background, volumetric light, shallow depth of field. Precise and architectural, like a security boundary — not chaotic.
